strategy: His minion, the Mysterious Werewolf, revives once at full Health and then leaves combat, so expect to kill it twice before it is gone for good.
While the Werewolf lives it runs a 4-Round cycle: a double +30% Bladestorm on Round 1 and a -40% Balance Legion Shield on all allies on Round 2, so both bosses get buffed and shielded.
Break the Legion Shield or pierce through it before your real hit, and try to time your burst after the shield Round.
The boss is Myth and resists Myth 69% and other schools 39% but takes 30% more from Storm, so bring Storm.
Funnel blades to one hitter, deal with the reviving Werewolf, then burst the Infiltrator through the shield cycle.
cheatNotes: When the Mysterious Werewolf is defeated, it revives at 100% max Health and leaves combat at the end of the turn.
This minion cheat cycle repeats every 4 Rounds as long as the Werewolf is alive.
On the first Round of the cycle the Werewolf casts a Bladestorm giving two +30% damage charms to all allies.
On the second Round of the cycle the Werewolf casts a Balance Legion Shield giving a -40% damage ward to all allies.
